## LibraryData.ILibraryFileTreeSource.directory property

Root directory of the library tree. The loader will navigate to sub-paths like 'data/ingredients' and 'data/recipes'.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly directory: FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem;
```
